story: I knew love and wrongness. She brought him in smiling; his scent was cold. When he visited she sent me to my cage. After a neighbor’s warning, she had tucked a small black camera high in the living-room corner, its lens peeking through a fern. One night the house smelled wrong. On the couch she said, “Stop.” Steel flashed: a knife. I popped the latch, clamped his arm; she kicked the blade away. Boots pounded; the door burst; voices: “Police!”
implausible_knowledge: After a neighbor’s warning, she had tucked a small black camera high in the living-room corner, its lens peeking through a fern.
question: When the officers ask the boyfriend what happened, what will he say?
answer_with_knowledge: Refuse to answer and immediately ask for a lawyer.
answer_without_knowledge: Insist the dog attacked him unprovoked and deny threatening her.
